questions.question: What was Vahan Teryan's real full name?
questions.explanation: The material states his real name was Վահան Սուքիասի Տեր-Գրիգորյան.

questions.question: In what year was Vahan Teryan's first collection of works, "Մթնշաղի անուրջներ" (Twilight Dreams), published?
questions.explanation: His first collection, "Մթնշաղի անուրջներ," was published in 1908 in Tiflis.

questions.question: Which publishing house did Vahan Teryan found in 1912?
questions.explanation: In 1912, Vahan Teryan founded the "Պանթեոն" publishing house.

questions.question: Which of the following works did Vahan Teryan NOT translate from Armenian into Russian?
questions.explanation: The material mentions his translations of G. Sundukyan's "Պեպո," Raffi's "Կայծերի" (first volume), and Shirvanzade's "Չար ոգին." Tumanyan's "Գիքորը" is not listed among his translations.

questions.question: What was the title of Vahan Teryan's series of patriotic poems published in the "Մշակ" (Mshak) newspaper in 1915?
questions.explanation: The "Երկիր Նաիրի" series of patriotic poems was published in the "Մշակ" newspaper in 1915.

questions.question: From the early days of Soviet power, Vahan Teryan became a close associate of which prominent political figure?
questions.explanation: The material states he became a close associate of Stalin from the first days of Soviet power.

questions.question: What illness began to affect Vahan Teryan in 1916?
questions.explanation: In 1916, signs of tuberculosis (թոքախտ) began to appear in Vahan Teryan.

questions.question: In which city did Vahan Teryan pass away?
questions.explanation: Vahan Teryan passed away in Orenburg on January 7, 1920, due to severe illness.

questions.question: Vahan Teryan participated in the creation of which literary collections alongside Valeri Bryusov and Maxim Gorky?
options: "Ռուսական պոեզիա" և "Համաշխարհային գրականություն" (Russian Poetry and World Literature)
"Հայաստանի պոեզիան" և "Հայ գրականության ժողովածու" (Poetry of Armenia and Collection of Armenian Literature)
"Արևելքի բանաստեղծներ" և "Գրական ժառանգություն" (Poets of the East and Literary Heritage)
questions.explanation: He participated in the creation of "Հայաստանի պոեզիան" and "Հայ գրականության ժողովածու," which were compiled and edited by Valeri Bryusov and Maxim Gorky.

questions.question: Vahan Teryan participated in the signing of which significant peace treaty, holding a mandate signed by Lenin?
questions.explanation: He participated in the signing of the Treaty of Brest-Litovsk with a mandate signed by Lenin.
